시편 33:1.content: Rejoice in Yahweh, you righteous! Praise is fitting for the upright.

시편 33:2.content: Give thanks to Yahweh with the lyre. Sing praises to him with the harp of ten strings.

시편 33:3.content: Sing to him a new song. Play skillfully with a shout of joy!

시편 33:4.content: For Yahweh’s word is right. All his work is done in faithfulness.

시편 33:5.content: He loves righteousness and justice. The earth is full of the loving kindness of Yahweh.

시편 33:6.content: By Yahweh’s word, the heavens were made: all their army by the breath of his mouth.

시편 33:7.content: He gathers the waters of the sea together as a heap. He lays up the deeps in storehouses.

시편 33:8.content: Let all the earth fear Yahweh. Let all the inhabitants of the world stand in awe of him.

시편 33:9.content: For he spoke, and it was done. He commanded, and it stood firm.

시편 33:10.content: Yahweh brings the counsel of the nations to nothing. He makes the thoughts of the peoples to be of no effect.

시편 33:11.content: The counsel of Yahweh stands fast forever, the thoughts of his heart to all generations.

시편 33:12.content: Blessed is the nation whose God is Yahweh, the people whom he has chosen for his own inheritance.

시편 33:13.content: Yahweh looks from heaven. He sees all the sons of men.

시편 33:14.content: From the place of his habitation he looks out on all the inhabitants of the earth,

시편 33:15.content: he who fashions all of their hearts; and he considers all of their works.

시편 33:16.content: There is no king saved by the multitude of an army. A mighty man is not delivered by great strength.

시편 33:17.content: A horse is a vain thing for safety, neither does he deliver any by his great power.

시편 33:18.content: Behold, Yahweh’s eye is on those who fear him, on those who hope in his loving kindness,

시편 33:19.content: to deliver their soul from death, to keep them alive in famine.

시편 33:20.content: Our soul has waited for Yahweh. He is our help and our shield.

시편 33:21.content: For our heart rejoices in him, because we have trusted in his holy name.

시편 33:22.content: Let your loving kindness be on us, Yahweh, since we have hoped in you.
